title: Loeseneriella parkinsonii
taxonomy: Loeseneriella parkinsonii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to Madagascar. The genus Loeseneriella is closely related to the genus Euonymus, sharing similarities in their morphology. Loeseneriella parkinsonii is further classified as a member of the order Celastrales. Its classification is supported by botanical and molecular studies.
